title: shorea ovalis
intro: Shorea ovalis, also known as the Pili tree, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Shorea ovalis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Shorea ovalis include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicine, or as a natural remedy for various health issues.
